legal_notice: This registry is an engineering control, not legal advice. An approved or conditional decision means the recorded rights and source evidence passed this repository policy; it does not determine whether model training is lawful in every jurisdiction or whether model outputs inherit a source license.

sources.title: mathlib4
sources.decision_reason: Apache-2.0 repository with explicit redistribution and derivative-work grants; ingest only pinned commits and preserve notices.

acquisition.content_scope: Repository-authored content

governance.attribution_template: Retain the Apache-2.0 license, copyright notices and any NOTICE material; record the exact commit.

notes: Proof assistant coverage is uneven by area; declarations are not a substitute for prose pedagogy.

sources.title: Lean 4
sources.decision_reason: Apache-2.0 source suitable for tool-use and proof-language training when pinned and notice-compliant.

acquisition.content_scope: Repository-authored content

governance.attribution_template: Retain Apache-2.0 and repository notices; record the exact commit.

sources.title: Metamath set.mm
sources.decision_reason: The repository applies CC0-1.0 to the formal corpus; a pinned snapshot can enter the public-domain-equivalent shard.

acquisition.content_scope: Repository-authored content

governance.attribution_template: Record set.mm, project URL, commit and CC0 dedication even though attribution is not legally required.

sources.title: Open Logic Project
sources.decision_reason: Project materials are published under CC BY; source and PDFs may be adapted with attribution after snapshot verification.

acquisition.content_scope: Project-authored LaTeX source and generated text whose file-level notices agree with CC BY.
excludes: Third-party figures or readings carrying separate notices

governance.attribution_template: Credit the Open Logic Project and named contributors; include title, URL, version/commit and CC BY 4.0.

sources.title: DeepMind mathematics_dataset
sources.decision_reason: Apache-2.0 generator and data; keep generated instances versioned and separate from evaluation holdouts.

acquisition.content_scope: Repository-authored content

governance.attribution_template: Retain Apache-2.0 and cite the repository commit plus generator configuration.

notes: Evaluation-only by default to prevent benchmark leakage; newly generated variants require independent seeds and manifests.

sources.title: GSM8K
sources.decision_reason: MIT-licensed repository, but the canonical split is reserved for evaluation rather than training.

acquisition.content_scope: Repository-authored content

governance.attribution_template: Retain the MIT notice and cite GSM8K with the exact repository commit and split.

sources.title: MATH benchmark
sources.decision_reason: MIT-licensed repository; canonical problems and solutions are held out for evaluation and contamination audits.

acquisition.content_scope: Repository-authored content

governance.attribution_template: Retain the MIT notice and cite the benchmark paper, repository commit and split.

sources.title: LeanDojo tooling
sources.decision_reason: MIT-licensed tooling can support reproducible extraction; extracted traces inherit the licenses of their source repositories and are tracked separately.

acquisition.content_scope: LeanDojo-authored tooling only
excludes: Extracted theorem corpora from third-party repositories

governance.attribution_template: Retain the LeanDojo MIT notice and pin the exact tooling commit.

sources.title: SymPy
sources.decision_reason: BSD-3-Clause code provides symbolic algorithms and executable traces with standard notice retention.

acquisition.content_scope: Repository-authored content

governance.attribution_template: Retain BSD-3-Clause copyright and disclaimer; record version and commit.

sources.title: NumPy
sources.decision_reason: BSD-3-Clause code supplies reproducible array and linear-algebra primitives after third-party notice review.

acquisition.content_scope: Repository-authored content
excludes: Vendored third-party components not covered by NumPy primary license

governance.attribution_template: Retain NumPy copyright, BSD terms and applicable third-party notices; record version and commit.

sources.title: SciPy
sources.decision_reason: BSD-3-Clause code covers optimization, integration, ODEs, statistics and numerical methods, subject to bundled notices.

acquisition.content_scope: Repository-authored content
excludes: Vendored or optional third-party components with separate notices

governance.attribution_template: Retain SciPy copyright, BSD terms and applicable third-party notices; record version and commit.

sources.title: Julia language
sources.decision_reason: MIT-licensed language implementation supports executable mathematical workflows; bundled dependencies remain separately inventoried.

acquisition.content_scope: Repository-authored content
excludes: Bundled dependencies and standard-library components under separate licenses

governance.attribution_template: Retain the Julia MIT notice and all applicable dependency notices; record version and commit.

sources.title: OpenAlex snapshot
sources.decision_reason: OpenAlex releases its data under CC0; use only the dated snapshot and keep work-level links rather than assuming article-content rights.

acquisition.content_scope: OpenAlex metadata fields and identifiers
excludes: Linked article full text and third-party landing-page content

governance.attribution_template: Record OpenAlex snapshot date and CC0 status; cite upstream works separately.

sources.title: Unpaywall data snapshot
sources.decision_reason: Unpaywall database snapshots are CC0; locations are discovery metadata and do not convey rights in linked full text.

acquisition.content_scope: Unpaywall metadata and OA-location fields
excludes: Article full text at linked locations

governance.attribution_template: Record the Unpaywall snapshot date and CC0 status; retain DOI provenance.

sources.title: Active Calculus family
sources.decision_reason: CC BY-SA permits reuse with attribution and share-alike; ingest into a physically and logically isolated BY-SA shard after checking each edition and ancillary file.

acquisition.content_scope: Textbook source for Active Prelude, Single and Multivariable editions with matching license notices
excludes: Third-party images, WeBWorK items and instructor-only ancillaries unless separately cleared

governance.attribution_template: Credit the named authors and Active Calculus edition; include URL, commit/release and CC BY-SA 4.0; publish adaptations under the same license.

sources.title: Introduction to Modern Statistics and OpenIntro Statistics
sources.decision_reason: Most statistics textbooks are CC BY-SA 3.0, but partner books, teacher-only resources, branding and some media are exceptions; ingest only file-level-cleared materials.

acquisition.content_scope: OpenIntro-owned statistics textbook text, public labs and public datasets with matching notices

governance.attribution_template: Credit book authors and OpenIntro; include edition, URL, commit and CC BY-SA 3.0; remove branding from derivatives and preserve share-alike.

sources.title: Linear Algebra by Jim Hefferon
sources.decision_reason: Dual GFDL/CC BY-SA licensing permits adaptation; select the CC BY-SA path and isolate the resulting shard.

acquisition.content_scope: Book and solution-book source explicitly covered by the site license

governance.attribution_template: Credit Jim Hefferon, title and edition; include URL, commit and selected CC BY-SA license; preserve share-alike.

sources.title: Notes on Diffy Qs
sources.decision_reason: The book is dual licensed and the CC BY-SA 4.0 option supports commercial derivatives; keep all adaptations in a BY-SA shard.

acquisition.content_scope: Released book source and author-owned figures under the selected CC BY-SA 4.0 option
excludes: Third-party WeBWorK items unless their licenses are independently resolved

governance.attribution_template: Credit Jiří Lebl, book title and version; include URL, release hash and CC BY-SA 4.0; mark modifications.

sources.title: Basic Analysis by Jiří Lebl
sources.decision_reason: The text offers a CC BY-SA option; ingest the source and exercises into the same isolated share-alike family as Diffy Qs.

acquisition.content_scope: Released book source and author-owned figures under the CC BY-SA option

governance.attribution_template: Credit Jiří Lebl, book title and version; include URL, release hash and CC BY-SA 4.0; mark modifications.

sources.title: Tasty Bits of Several Complex Variables
sources.decision_reason: The text offers a CC BY-SA option and provides graduate exposition plus exercises in several complex variables.

acquisition.content_scope: Released book source and author-owned figures under the CC BY-SA option

governance.attribution_template: Credit Jiří Lebl, book title and version; include URL, release hash and CC BY-SA 4.0; mark modifications.

sources.title: Discrete Mathematics: An Open Introduction
sources.decision_reason: CC BY-SA 4.0 text and source provide proof-oriented discrete mathematics with extensive exercises and solutions.

acquisition.content_scope: Book source and embedded materials whose notices match CC BY-SA

governance.attribution_template: Credit Oscar Levin, title and edition; include source URL, commit and CC BY-SA 4.0; preserve share-alike.

sources.title: Homotopy Type Theory: Univalent Foundations of Mathematics
sources.decision_reason: The book is Creative Commons licensed and source-controlled; confirm the exact license in the pinned snapshot and preserve its share-alike terms.

acquisition.content_scope: Book source and project-authored figures covered by the repository license

governance.attribution_template: Credit The Univalent Foundations Program; include title, commit/version and CC BY-SA license; preserve share-alike.

sources.title: The Stacks Project
sources.decision_reason: GFDL 1.2 is a documentation copyleft license with substantial redistribution obligations; use only in a dedicated GFDL retrieval/training experiment after counsel review.

acquisition.content_scope: Stacks Project LaTeX source and tag metadata

governance.attribution_template: Preserve GFDL notices, transparent source, history and required license text; cite permanent tags and exact commit.

sources.title: Wikipedia mathematics namespace selections
sources.decision_reason: CC BY-SA/GFDL content is reusable only with revision-level attribution, license-version tracking and template/media exclusions.

acquisition.content_scope: Selected revision text from mathematics pages with page/revision attribution

governance.attribution_template: Store page title, revision ID, contributors link, source URL and CC BY-SA/GFDL notices for every extracted unit.

sources.title: Wikibooks mathematics selections
sources.decision_reason: CC BY-SA/GFDL books can broaden elementary algebra, geometry, calculus and statistics, but revision attribution and media filtering are mandatory.

acquisition.content_scope: Selected book revisions with page-level attribution

governance.attribution_template: Store book/page title, revision ID, contributor history URL and CC BY-SA/GFDL notices.

sources.title: Wikiversity mathematics selections
sources.decision_reason: Useful for activities and multilingual curricula, but quality varies and revision-level CC BY-SA attribution is mandatory.

acquisition.content_scope: Curated course and exercise revisions with provenance

governance.attribution_template: Store project/page title, revision ID, contributor history URL and CC BY-SA/GFDL notices.

sources.title: PlanetMath
sources.decision_reason: CC BY-SA content can supply definitions, examples and theorem links; export and attribution mechanics must be verified before ingestion.

acquisition.content_scope: Article text and structured links with author/page attribution
excludes: External linked content and media without compatible notices

governance.attribution_template: Store article title, author/contributor identifiers, URL, revision date and CC BY-SA notice.

sources.title: ProofWiki
sources.decision_reason: CC BY-SA proof pages are useful for proof retrieval, but require revision attribution, quality filtering and benchmark contamination controls.

acquisition.content_scope: Proof and definition page text with revision histories

governance.attribution_template: Store page title, revision ID, contributor history URL and CC BY-SA notice.

sources.title: Mathematics Stack Exchange data dump
sources.decision_reason: CC BY-SA permits reuse with attribution and version-specific share-alike, but user-generated content carries identity, deletion and moderation risks; keep it retrieval-only after aggressive PII minimization and post-level license tracking.

acquisition.content_scope: Public posts with post ID, author attribution and applicable license version
excludes: Deleted or private posts, profiles, email hashes, avatars and unnecessary user identifiers
Posts whose applicable historical CC BY-SA version cannot be reconstructed
Benchmark or competition items selected for evaluation

governance.attribution_template: Store post ID, title, URL, author display name, timestamp, revision and applicable CC BY-SA version.

sources.title: Project Gutenberg public-domain mathematics selections
sources.decision_reason: Project Gutenberg status is jurisdiction-specific and item-specific; only ingest editions whose rights are rechecked for the deployment jurisdiction.

acquisition.content_scope: Project Gutenberg text for individually cleared editions
excludes: Project Gutenberg trademarks/license boilerplate from training text
Items not public domain in target jurisdictions

governance.attribution_template: Record ebook number, title, authors/editors, edition, source URL, access date, item rights determination and SHA-256.

sources.title: arXiv license-resolved mathematics subset
sources.decision_reason: arXiv hosts papers under author-selected licenses; only CC0/CC BY/CC BY-SA or otherwise counsel-approved items may enter, each with its license and version pinned.

acquisition.content_scope: Only individual arXiv versions with machine-recorded compatible license identifiers
excludes: Default arXiv non-exclusive distribution license unless separately approved

governance.attribution_template: Store arXiv ID and version, title, authors, submission date, DOI, item license URL and source hash.

sources.title: The On-Line Encyclopedia of Integer Sequences
sources.decision_reason: OEIS data is share-alike licensed and attribution-sensitive; ingest structured fields only from a pinned export and retain sequence-level provenance.

acquisition.content_scope: Structured sequence records and references from the official export
excludes: Linked full text and user comments outside exported records

governance.attribution_template: Retain A-number, entry contributors, modification date, OEIS URL and CC BY-SA 4.0 notice.

sources.title: LMFDB
sources.decision_reason: LMFDB data and site materials require project-license verification at snapshot time; use a dedicated attribution/share-alike shard and preserve object identifiers.

acquisition.content_scope: Official database exports and schema documentation

governance.attribution_template: Retain database object identifiers, snapshot date, project citation and applicable CC BY-SA notice.

sources.title: zbMATH Open metadata and reviews
sources.decision_reason: Open metadata/review reuse is license- and field-sensitive; snapshot only fields explicitly released and preserve review authorship.

acquisition.content_scope: Fields explicitly covered by the open-data terms
excludes: Publisher abstracts or full text not covered by zbMATH terms

governance.attribution_template: Retain review author, record identifier, source URL, snapshot date and applicable license notice.

sources.title: NIST Digital Library of Mathematical Functions
sources.decision_reason: NIST employee works receive broad reuse rights, but DLMF contains third-party contributions and figures; ingest only sections whose notices and authorship are cleared.

acquisition.content_scope: NIST-authored sections and machine-readable formulas with section-level rights records
excludes: Third-party authored material, images or tables without separate clearance

governance.attribution_template: Acknowledge NIST, cite DLMF section and version/date, record authorship and rights basis, and mark modifications.

sources.title: NIST/SEMATECH e-Handbook of Statistical Methods
sources.decision_reason: High-value statistics exposition and examples; section-level NIST/third-party authorship and image rights must be resolved before ingestion.

acquisition.content_scope: Cleared NIST-authored handbook sections and examples
excludes: Third-party contributions, images and linked datasets without compatible terms

governance.attribution_template: Acknowledge NIST/SEMATECH, cite section URL and access/version date, record rights basis and mark changes.

sources.title: SageMath
sources.decision_reason: GPL code is reusable but must remain isolated with source and copyleft obligations; package-level licenses must also be preserved.

acquisition.content_scope: SageMath-authored source plus package-level license inventory
excludes: Bundled packages whose licenses are not admitted by the target shard

governance.attribution_template: Preserve GPL source offer, copyright notices, modification history and every bundled-package license; record release/commit.

sources.title: GAP
sources.decision_reason: GPL code is valuable for computational algebra but requires copyleft isolation and package-by-package license review.

acquisition.content_scope: GAP core and individually cleared packages
excludes: Packages with incompatible or missing licenses

governance.attribution_template: Preserve GPL terms, source availability and package-specific notices; record release/commit.

sources.title: PARI/GP
sources.decision_reason: GPL code supports number theory and exact computation but belongs in the isolated copyleft-code shard.

acquisition.content_scope: Repository-authored content

governance.attribution_template: Preserve GPL terms, source availability and copyright notices; record release/commit.

sources.title: HOL Light
sources.decision_reason: BSD-style project source is broadly reusable, but examples and imported benchmark translations need file-level provenance.

acquisition.content_scope: HOL Light repository files whose headers agree with the project license
excludes: Imported third-party examples without matching headers

governance.attribution_template: Retain BSD notices and file authorship; record exact commit.

sources.title: Rocq/Coq and standard library
sources.decision_reason: LGPL/coproduct licensing is reusable for code and formal corpora, but standard-library and plugin licenses require component-level inventory.

acquisition.content_scope: Core and standard-library files with compatible headers

governance.attribution_template: Preserve LGPL, exception text, copyright notices and component provenance; record release/commit.

sources.title: Isabelle distribution
sources.decision_reason: The distribution uses permissive component licenses, but the exact release copyright inventory must be pinned and audited.

acquisition.content_scope: Pinned Isabelle release and its documented component inventory
excludes: External sessions not distributed with the release

governance.attribution_template: Preserve the release COPYRIGHT inventory and all component notices; record release identifier and hash.

sources.title: Archive of Formal Proofs
sources.decision_reason: AFP entries carry entry-level licenses and authorship; only a generated allowlist of compatible entries may be ingested.

acquisition.content_scope: Entries whose license metadata passes the allowlist
excludes: Entries with missing, incompatible or ambiguous license metadata

governance.attribution_template: Store AFP entry, version, authors, citation, license, dependencies and source hash.

sources.title: Mizar Mathematical Library
sources.decision_reason: Formal articles are highly valuable but the exact GPL/library terms and contributor notices must be verified against the selected release.

acquisition.content_scope: Mizar items whose repository and article notices match the admitted license
excludes: External articles or tools under different terms

governance.attribution_template: Preserve GPL terms, article authorship and release/commit provenance.

sources.title: GeoCoq
sources.decision_reason: A formal Euclidean-geometry corpus with copyleft code obligations; verify repository headers and isolate with Coq-family licensing.

acquisition.content_scope: GeoCoq-authored formal source with matching headers
excludes: Generated or imported files with separate terms

governance.attribution_template: Preserve LGPL terms, authorship and exact commit; retain dependency notices.

sources.title: UniMath
sources.decision_reason: Formal category-theory and foundations corpus; verify the pinned repository license and dependency notices before use.

acquisition.content_scope: UniMath-authored formal source
excludes: External dependencies and generated artifacts with separate terms

governance.attribution_template: Retain BSD notice, contributor provenance and exact commit.

sources.title: LeanDojo extracted proof traces
sources.decision_reason: The extraction tooling is MIT, but every trace inherits the source repository license; generate only from an allowlisted, pinned dependency graph.

acquisition.content_scope: Traces from allowlisted source repositories with transitive license manifests
excludes: Canonical benchmark splits reserved for evaluation

governance.attribution_template: For every trace, retain source repository, file, declaration, commit, license and extraction-tool version.

sources.title: FiPy
sources.decision_reason: NIST-developed PDE solver code has broad reuse terms, but dependencies and foreign/third-party rights require notice preservation.

acquisition.content_scope: FiPy-authored source and examples
excludes: Third-party dependencies and datasets under separate terms

governance.attribution_template: Acknowledge NIST and FiPy, retain the full NIST notice, dependency licenses, version and commit.

sources.title: CGAL
sources.decision_reason: Computational-geometry packages are GPL/LGPL depending on component; build a package-level allowlist and retain copyleft obligations.

acquisition.content_scope: Individually inventoried CGAL packages and examples
excludes: Packages whose license is not admitted

governance.attribution_template: Retain package-level GPL/LGPL notices, source obligations, authorship and exact release.

sources.title: Zenodo license-resolved mathematics records
sources.decision_reason: Zenodo record content is licensed per item; only records with compatible machine-readable licenses and checksums may enter.

acquisition.content_scope: Record files with allowlisted licenses plus record metadata

governance.attribution_template: Store DOI, record/version, creators, file checksums, item license and citation.

sources.title: Crossref metadata API
sources.decision_reason: Use for DOI and citation metadata only; abstracts and deposited third-party fields may have separate rights.

acquisition.content_scope: Bibliographic facts and identifiers explicitly covered by Crossref metadata terms
excludes: Abstracts, full text and publisher-deposited content without independent rights

governance.attribution_template: Retain DOI, depositor/source, retrieval date and field-level rights information.

sources.title: Semantic Scholar API metadata
sources.decision_reason: Use identifiers, graph links and permitted API fields only; do not treat paper text or abstracts as blanket-licensed.

acquisition.content_scope: API fields permitted by current terms
excludes: Author profile data not needed for citation

governance.attribution_template: Record API version, paper identifier, source, retrieval date and field-level terms.

sources.title: arXiv unfiltered metadata
sources.decision_reason: Metadata can route discovery, but article content remains per-item licensed and must pass the separate license-resolved gate.

acquisition.content_scope: Identifiers, titles, authors, categories, dates and item-license links
excludes: Source/PDF text without compatible item license

governance.attribution_template: Retain arXiv ID/version, title, authors, date, category and item-license URL.

sources.title: Open Textbook Library catalog
sources.decision_reason: The catalog helps discover textbooks but each book has its own license; catalog inclusion is not permission to ingest content.

acquisition.content_scope: Catalog metadata and license links

governance.attribution_template: Record catalog URL, book record, listed license and review date; verify at the publisher.

sources.title: AIM Open Textbook Initiative list
sources.decision_reason: A quality-oriented discovery list, not a blanket content license; every textbook must be independently reviewed.

acquisition.content_scope: Titles, authors and source links

governance.attribution_template: Record AIM listing and then the authoritative publisher license evidence.

sources.title: GeoGebra Materials catalog
sources.decision_reason: Materials are user-uploaded and license status varies; keep only links and metadata until each resource is cleared.

acquisition.content_scope: Resource metadata and links only
excludes: Applets, worksheets, images and text without an explicit compatible license

governance.attribution_template: Record resource ID, creator, URL, version/date and explicit item license before any content use.

sources.title: LibreTexts mathematics catalog
sources.decision_reason: Licenses vary by page and many materials are noncommercial; use only for discovery until page-level rights are machine-verified.

acquisition.content_scope: Page titles, source links and license metadata
excludes: Page text, figures and transclusions until page-level license resolution

governance.attribution_template: Record page URL, revision/date, original source, authors and page-level license.

sources.title: Introduction to Probability by Grinstead and Snell
sources.decision_reason: Promising probability text, but the exact current source and license notice must be captured from the authoritative distribution before content ingestion.

acquisition.content_scope: Metadata and citation only until license verification
excludes: All book text before verified license capture

governance.attribution_template: Record title, authors, edition, authoritative URL, hash and verified license before promotion.

sources.title: Euclidean Plane and its Relatives
sources.decision_reason: High-value elementary geometry candidate; arXiv availability alone is not enough, so item-license verification is required.

acquisition.content_scope: Metadata and citation only until the item license is allowlisted

governance.attribution_template: Record arXiv ID/version, authors, title, item license and hash before promotion.

sources.title: OpenStax current textbooks
sources.decision_reason: Current pages explicitly prohibit LLM training/ingestion without permission and use a noncommercial share-alike license.

acquisition.content_scope: Metadata and links only
excludes: All textbook content without written OpenStax permission

governance.attribution_template: Do not ingest. Keep only title, URL and the blocking decision.

sources.title: MIT OpenCourseWare
sources.decision_reason: Default CC BY-NC-SA terms are noncommercial and include additional platform conditions; no content ingestion into a general-purpose frontier-model corpus.

acquisition.content_scope: Metadata and links only
excludes: All course content unless separately licensed or permission obtained

governance.attribution_template: Do not ingest; preserve only catalog metadata and source link.

sources.title: Book of Proof
sources.decision_reason: CC BY-ND forbids derivative works; transformation into training examples, normalized chunks or adapted exercises is outside this corpus policy.

acquisition.content_scope: Metadata and links only
excludes: All text and exercises for transformed corpus use

governance.attribution_template: Do not ingest; keep title, author, URL and CC BY-ND decision.

sources.title: nLab
sources.decision_reason: No sufficiently clear blanket content license was verified for corpus ingestion.

acquisition.content_scope: Metadata and links only
excludes: All page content until an authoritative compatible license is documented

governance.attribution_template: Do not ingest; preserve only URLs and the unresolved-license decision.

sources.title: Paul's Online Math Notes
sources.decision_reason: Free access is not an open license; no compatible redistribution/derivative permission was verified.

acquisition.content_scope: Metadata and links only

governance.attribution_template: Do not ingest; retain only source metadata.

sources.title: Art of Problem Solving content
sources.decision_reason: No blanket compatible content license; forums also contain user data and severe benchmark contamination risk.

acquisition.content_scope: Metadata and links only

governance.attribution_template: Do not ingest; preserve only catalog links where useful.

sources.title: Project Euler problem content
sources.decision_reason: Public availability does not grant a compatible corpus license, and canonical problems are highly contamination-sensitive.

acquisition.content_scope: Problem IDs and links only

governance.attribution_template: Do not ingest canonical content; retain only IDs/links for contamination checking.

sources.title: Common Crawl raw web corpus
sources.decision_reason: The crawl has no blanket downstream content license; source-site rights, robots, privacy and takedowns must be resolved independently.

acquisition.content_scope: URL discovery only
excludes: All crawled page content without origin-level license resolution

governance.attribution_template: Do not ingest raw crawl content; use URLs only to locate authoritative licensed sources.

sources.title: Internet Archive mixed collections
sources.decision_reason: The platform does not provide a blanket license for deposited items; each item must be promoted through the per-item workflow instead.

acquisition.content_scope: Metadata and links only
excludes: All item files until item rights are independently verified

governance.attribution_template: Do not ingest platform-wide; route individual items through per-item license and hash review.

sources.title: OpenWebMath and similar web-derived math corpora
sources.decision_reason: A dataset-level license does not necessarily clear upstream page copyrights; provenance and origin licenses are insufficiently granular for this policy.

acquisition.content_scope: Metadata and dataset card only
excludes: All records until origin-level licenses and takedown provenance are available

governance.attribution_template: Do not ingest; retain dataset-card metadata and provenance gaps.

sources.title: MathPile and mixed-source mathematical corpora
sources.decision_reason: Mixed upstream licenses, noncommercial components and benchmark overlap prevent blanket admission; source-by-source promotion is required.

acquisition.content_scope: Dataset card and source inventory only

governance.attribution_template: Do not ingest wholesale; re-evaluate each named upstream source through this registry.

sources.title: IMO, Putnam, MAA and similar competition archives
sources.decision_reason: No blanket compatible content license was established and canonical problems must remain protected evaluation material.

acquisition.content_scope: Event/problem identifiers and links only

governance.attribution_template: Do not ingest; retain identifiers only for decontamination and evaluation governance.
